key_suppliers: Commonwealth Annuity and Life Insurance Company
dependencies: Third-party service providers for communications, technology and business functions
Clearing agents, exchanges, clearing houses for securities transactions
Reinsurance companies (Commonwealth Annuity and Life Insurance Company, Genworth Life Insurance Company)
risks: Counterparty default or failure to fulfill obligations by reinsurers
Failures or defaults by reinsurance counterparties
Reliance on franchise advisors who control their own technology infrastructure
Termination or capacity constraints of clearing agents and exchanges
Interruptions or failures in operating systems and networks including errors by third-party service providers
Operational failure of third-party service providers
Loss of unaffiliated third-party distribution channels
Concentration risk with Genworth Life Insurance Company for reinsured long-term care business
Vendor management and cybersecurity risks from third-party systems
Cybersecurity risks from third-party service providers and their fourth-parties

Supervision by Federal Reserve Board as savings and loan holding company with prudential standards limiting activities
NY DFS Cybersecurity Requirements for Financial Services Companies
FCA Consumer Duty and sustainability disclosure requirements in UK
USA Patriot Act anti-money laundering requirements

Changes in corporate tax laws and regulations including Inflation Reduction Act provisions (CAMT and share repurchase excise tax)
OCC and FDIC regulation of Ameriprise Bank
FCA and PRA regulation in United Kingdom
Regulatory approval requirements for insurance premium rate increases
CFTC and NFA regulation for commodity trading and derivatives
State privacy laws including California privacy legislation
MiFID II, AIFMD, EMIR, UCITS, SFDR, PRIIPs regulations in Europe
DOL fiduciary rules for retirement investing (ERISA)
CFPB consumer protection regulations
NAIC Insurance Holding Company System Regulatory Act and ORSA requirements
Potential regulatory changes from new US administration
Risk-based capital (RBC) requirements for insurance subsidiaries
Data collection, storage and privacy regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Bank holding company regulations and capital requirements may limit dividend payments and stock repurchases
Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) for banking operations
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading and covered funds
OECD Pillar Two minimum tax rules in various jurisdictions
Building Block Approach (BBA) capital framework for insurance savings and loan holding companies
GDPR and UK Data Protection Act for data privacy
Dividend restrictions and capital requirements for regulated subsidiaries
Compliance with Volcker Rule impacting product structure and costs
FINRA rules on net capital requirements and trading activities
State guaranty fund assessment requirements
Artificial intelligence regulation and oversight
Investment Company Act regulation of mutual funds and separate accounts
SEC regulation of broker-dealers and investment advisers under Exchange Act and Advisers Act
SEC Regulation Best Interest standard of care
Data protection and privacy regulations
New EU regulations including DORA, CSRD, CSDDD, AIFMD 2.0, EMIR 3.0
Climate-related disclosure requirements (California)
FRB regulation as savings and loan holding company under Bank Holding Company Act
Enhanced scrutiny on ESG considerations and responsible investing
Investment Company Act of 1940 requirements for Ameriprise Certificate Company
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act, HIPAA/HITECH Act for personal information protection
Electronic communication recordkeeping requirements
Operational resilience and financial resilience requirements in UK
State insurance regulatory requirements and guaranty fund assessments
State fiduciary and best interest rules for financial advisors
UK Financial Conduct Authority regulation of international operations
Cybersecurity and resilience regulatory requirements
Regulatory actions and examinations concerning business practices and compliance
OCC regulation of Ameriprise Bank as federal savings bank
SEC and FINRA regulatory oversight of broker-dealers
EU Artificial Intelligence Act and proposed US AI laws

sanction_risks: Compliance with sanctions regulations mentioned as regulatory risk
